source_item.title: The F&O trap inside the barracks: How army officers are losing crores chasing the next trade

slide1_hook.label: Officers, Stable Salaries, and **Crores Lost** in F&O
slide1_hook.subhead: The F&O trap has found a new victim inside the barracks.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: F&O Was Already a **Mass Problem**
slide2_backstory.body: In FY25, 91% of retail traders in India lost money on F&O. The average loss per person was Rs 1.1 lakh, and total losses hit Rs 1.06 lakh crore in a single year.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Now It Is **Hitting the Barracks**
slide3_news.body: Serving and retired defence officers are falling into the same trap. A stable salary gives them easy loan access, early wins build false confidence, and leveraged bets then wipe out savings worth crores.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: A Salary That Feels Safe Is **Deadly Bait**
bullets: Guaranteed pay makes banks offer big credit lines
One winning trade hooks you. Losses come quietly.
Retirement savings wiped out, not just pocket money

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Should the army **ban F&O trading** for serving officers?
slide5_engage.cta: Drop your take below. Share this with someone still chasing the next trade.
